productDisplayName: Gini and Jony Boy's Kimon Blue Bermuda Kidswear
description: CompositionBlue denim bermudas in stretchable cotton fabric, with black thread stitching, two insert pockets on the front, two patch pockets on the back, with elasticated waist and with a light blue woven belt with metal loops FittingRegular98 cm (24-30 months)Wash care Machine wash separately in cold water Use mild detergent Do not bleach Avoid soaking Remove promptly Line dry inside out in shade Warm iron only Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Get your little one up and about in a pair of bermudas that play as hard as he does from gini and jony. Team this with a white tee and crocs footwear when you take him out next time, while the stretchable cotton fabric keeps him feeling fresh and comfortable all day long.
